## TemplateValue type

Represents the types of values that can be interpolated into a template.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type TemplateValue<TSource, TParent = any> = Expression<TSource, any, TParent> | Binding<TSource, any, TParent> | HTMLDirective | CaptureType<TSource, TParent>;
```
**References:** [Expression](./fast-element.expression.md)<!-- -->, [Binding](./fast-element.binding.md)<!-- -->, [HTMLDirective](./fast-element.htmldirective.md)<!-- -->, [CaptureType](./fast-element.capturetype.md)
